reviews.textTranslated: We have been so impressed by the service from the Darmar Group team in moving our contents from a storage unit in Auckland to our new home in BoP. Reasonably priced too. Can totally recommend them for any move.

reviews.textTranslated: I found the thought of moving all my furniture etc to another town quite daunting but Prince from Darmar Group ensured the whole process ran smoothly from start to finish, even immediately providing another truck when we realised my furniture wasn't going to fit in one truck.  The guys who packed my furniture were absolutely amazing - nothing was too much trouble for them and they were super efficient and friendly too.  I was really happy with the cost of moving - very reasonable.  Darmar Group is simply the best moving company to choose if you are moving house.  I wouldn't hesitate to recommend these guys to anyone.  They are awesome!  Thank you Darmar Group for a job well done.

reviews.textTranslated:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️½ – Great Movers, Just Sort the Pricing

Prince and Willy were awesome – great communication, turned up on time, and worked consistently and efficiently. No complaints at all about the job they did – everything was handled with care and done well.

The only reason I’m not giving a full five stars is because the pricing was a unclear. Make sure you double-check whether the quote is for half an hour or a full hour, and whether GST is included. Could’ve been clearer upfront.

Otherwise, really happy with the service – would definitely use them again!
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️½ – Great Movers, Just Sort the Pricing

Prince and Willy were awesome – great communication, turned up on time, and worked consistently and efficiently. No complaints at all about the job they did – everything was handled with care and done well.

The only reason I’m not giving a full five stars is because the pricing was a unclear. Make sure you double-check whether the quote is for half an hour or a full hour, and whether GST is included. Could’ve been clearer upfront.

Otherwise, really happy with the service – would definitely use them again!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thanks for your your great feedback we really appreciate it and will make sure to sort this issue so we can make pricing more easy understandable for our future clients.

Thanks
reviews.name: K Paekau
reviews.address: 10 Ballintoy Park Drive, Welcome Bay, Tauranga 3175, New Zealand
reviews.title: Darmar Group

reviews.textTranslated:
We recently used Darmar Group to transport the contents of our house, and we couldn't be happier with the service. Prince and his team arrived right on time and handled everything with the utmost care — both during loading and unloading at the other end. Not so much as a scratch on any of our items!

Their professionalism and friendly attitude made the whole moving experience smooth and stress-free. It's clear they take pride in what they do, and it really shows in the quality of their work.

We would highly recommend Darmar Group to anyone, whether you're moving across town or across the country.

reviews.name: jong malayao
reviews.address: 10 Ballintoy Park Drive, Welcome Bay, Tauranga 3175, New Zealand
reviews.title: Darmar Group

reviews.textTranslated:
I recently relocated from Tauranga to Auckland and hired Darmar Group Tauranga for the job. From the initial inquiry to the final delivery, their service was absolutely outstanding. The team was extremely professional, punctual, and well-organised. They communicated clearly throughout the entire process, arrived on time, and handled all my belongings with great care.

What stood out the most was their efficiency and attention to detail—they packed, loaded, and delivered everything without any damage or delays. On top of that, their pricing was very reasonable and cost-effective, especially for a long-distance move.

Moving can be stressful, but Darmar Group made it feel seamless and stress-free. I highly recommend them to anyone needing reliable movers, whether you're moving locally or across the region. Definitely a five-star experience!
reviews.text:
